arts.ttl: Rusty Rodri needs more Manchester City games after poor advert for new world
arts.athr: Barney Ronay at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: Midfielder was weirdly isolated in a contest lacking tension which was interesting only for the questions it raised Well, Rodri was right about one thing. We definitely need a few less games like this one. Welcome to the new world of Uefa expansionism, a competition without structure, designed solely to provide another roll of TV wallpaper, and on this evidence a place lacking some vital degree of tension or shape. The most dramatic moment at a room temperature Etihad Stadium arrived on 78 minutes. As Inter missed one of several good chances on the night, Simone Inzaghi, their thrillingly energetic manager, could be seen literally on his hands and knees in cat stretch position, beating the turf with his hands, as though performing a steamy 1980s soft rock music video dance, whipping his hair, grinding the knees of his elegant dark suit into the grass. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City 0-0 Inter Milan PLAYER RATINGS: Which superstar had a night to forget? Who was almost flawless at the back? And how did Jack Grealish get on?
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's side lifted the European Cup the last time the two teams met just 15 months ago. And the performance of the Italian champions showed their performance in Istanbul was not a one-off.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne a doubt to face Arsenal after frustrating night for Man City
arts.sum: City failed to spark as a positive Inter, who created some of the best chances during the game, claimed a creditable draw.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne a doubt to face Arsenal due to groin injury in draw with Inter
arts.athr: Jamie Jackson at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: City playmaker taken off in Champions League match Guardiola pleased with draw against Italian champions Kevin De Bruyne is an injury doubt for Manchester City’s showdown with Arsenal on Sunday after suffering what appeared to be a groin injury in the Champions League goalless draw with Inter at the Etihad Stadium. The Belgian was hurt when running in on goal and being challenged by Yann Sommer, the Inter No 1, during the first half, afterwards seeming to clutch his groin area. Following treatment De Bruyne continued until the break but was then taken off. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City left sweating on the fitness of Kevin De Bruyne after veteran star was taken off injured at half-time against Inter Milan... just four days before crunch Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Guardiola revealed that he was planning to substitute the Belgian regardless and is hoping for more clarity on his fitness concerns over the next 48 hours.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola coy over Kevin De Bruyne injury as Man City boss hails 'fantastic' team after Inter Milan draw
arts.sum: Premier League champions host Arsenal on Sunday in what could already be a title showdown

arts.ttl: Guardiola happy with Manchester City point against ‘masters’ Inter
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was ‘very happy’ with a point against Inter in the Champions League, noting...

arts.sum: Francesco Acerbi was seen joking with Erling Haaland after the final whistle of Inter’s 0-0...

arts.ttl: Inzaghi reveals Manchester City record he preferred Inter to ‘ruin’
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi outlined what Inter still ‘need to work on’ and improve after neutralising Manchester...

arts.ttl: Inter Milan boss Simone Inzaghi FUMES at ex-Man United star after he bizarrely opted to pass despite being through on goal during stalemate with Man City
arts.sum: It was a resolute performance from Inter, who sat back and soaked up the pressure with the aim of hitting City on the counterattack - and their heir game plan almost came to fruition.
